headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Is Up 5.3% After Russell 1000 Addition And Upbeat Q2 EPS Forecast
summary: Recently, J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. was added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, while analysts projected its upcoming Q2 2026 diluted EPS at US$1.70, implying very large year-on-year growth supported by stronger freight demand and higher intermodal and truckload volumes. This combination of index inclusion and upbeat earnings expectations highlights how J.B. Hunt’s scale and freight exposure are drawing increased institutional attention and scrutiny. Next, we’ll examine how these...
